title: Japan’s top securities firms prepare crypto exchange pivot
snippet: Three Japanese securities giants with a combined market cap of around $48 billion say they are considering launching crypto exchange businesses.

title: Bluefin forms token strategy partnership with Basis Theory
snippet: Bluefin, the global leader in payment and data security infrastructure and PCI-validated point-to-point encryption (P2PE), today announced a strategic partnership with Basis Theory, a modern, API-driven tokenization and vaulting platform.

title: Payoneer taps Bridge for stablecoin roll out
snippet: Payoneer (NASDAQ: PAYO), the global financial technology company powering business growth across borders, today announced plans to launch a suite of stablecoin capabilities embedded within the Payoneer platform.

title: Anthony Scaramucci’s son buys Logan Paul’s previously tokenized Pokemon card for record $16 million
snippet: In April 2022, Logan Paul raised $8 million to launch Liquid Marketplace, a platform for tokenizing physical and digital collectibles.

title: Binance holds 65% of CEX stablecoin reserves as outflows cool: CryptoQuant
snippet: Stablecoin outflows slow to $2 billion as Binance consolidates 65% of CEX liquidity, signaling capital concentration even amid the ongoing crypto bear market.

title: Amid crypto VC shakeout, Dragonfly closes $650M fund with focus on real-world assets
snippet: Dragonfly’s raise comes as crypto venture capital shifts toward tokenized real-world assets, payments and core financial infrastructure that enables institutional participation.

title: Quantoz partners with Visa to make stablecoins spendable
snippet: Quantoz Payments B.V. (Quantoz) the Netherlands headquartered payments technology company, is pleased to announce that it has entered into a partnership with Visa to become a direct Visa principal member.

title: Monad hires former FalconX, BVNK and Optimism executives
snippet: The appointments add traditional finance and institutional crypto experience as the layer-1 blockchain scales its post-launch strategy.

title: Ethereum’s tokenized RWA market jumps more than 300% year over year as value tops $17 billion
snippet: Ethereum’s tokenized real-world asset market cap has topped $17 billion, up nearly 315% year over year as more TradFi giants move onchain.

title: Strategy’s Bitcoin Buying Accelerates as $48 Billion BTC Stash Sits Underwater
snippet: Strategy reported its fourth-largest Bitcoin purchase of the year, a week after Michael Saylor's defense of the company's became a meme.

title: Germany‘s central bank president touts stablecoin and CBDC benefits for EU
snippet: Joachim Nagel said euro-pegged stablecoins would offer the bloc more independence from US dollar-pegged coins soon to be allowed under the GENIUS Act.

title: Poland president vetoes MiCA bill again as crypto companies look to license abroad
snippet: President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a second MiCA crypto bill, saying it was “practically identical” to a previous version, leaving local companies in limbo ahead of a summer MiCA deadline.

snippet: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.

title: Payoneer Adds Stablecoin Capabilities for Cross-Border Businesses
snippet: Small-business focused FinTech Payoneer is adding stablecoin capabilities to its platform. The new offering, powered by stablecoin infrastructure platform Bridge, will let businesses securely receive, hold and send stablecoins as part of their everyday operations, Payoneer said in a Tuesday (Feb. 17

title: NY Fed Says Digital Dollar Debate About Payments Versus Lending
snippet: Human civilization and the concept of money have historically been intertwined. title: Kraken sponsors Trump Accounts in Wyoming, citing crypto alignment
snippet: The Wyoming-based crypto exchange said it wanted to give back to the state it calls home, which it chose for its “responsible” approach to crypto regulation.

title: Crypto custodian BitGo a potential acquisition target for Wall Street firms, analysts say
Crypto infrastructure project unveils LI.FI Composer, a multi-step transaction orchestrator
snippet: LiFI Composer allows users to combine different actions like swaps, bridging, deposits, and staking into a single transaction.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
snippet: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: ACI Worldwide reports UK bank win for Connetic cloud-native platform
snippet: ACI Worldwide (NASDAQ:ACIW), an original innovator in global payments technology, today announced a major step forward in the UK’s payments modernization journey as a leading UK retail bank chooses ACI Connetic — the industry’s first unified, cloud-native platform — for deployment.

title: TON Foundation partners with OSL’s Banxa to expand stablecoin payment infrastructure for Asia-Pacific merchants
snippet: TON Foundation and Banxa have partnered to enable stablecoin payments for APAC merchants using TON infrastructure.

title: Trump filling Democratic seats at SEC, CFTC could advance crypto bill talks, TD Cowen says
snippet: "This would ensure Democrats could immediately control those agencies if they win the 2028 presidential election," TD said.

title: South Korea lifts 9-year corporate crypto ban: What the policy change means
snippet: South Korea reopens crypto to corporations with strict caps and asset limits. This is part of a broader strategy that includes stablecoin legislation and potential spot crypto ETFs.

title: Stablecoins gain ground for paychecks and daily spending: BVNK report
snippet: A global survey of 4,658 crypto users found 39% receive income in stablecoins and 27% use them for payments, with stronger adoption in emerging markets.
